{{CargoOrgan
|name=Cursed Sigil
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10675
|idx=32
|description=A demonic seal that breaks hell’s chains. It grants agony beyond mortal endurance—and defenses rivaling demonic armor.
|skill=Blessed by Calsifer, dealing DMG equal to 54.3% of ATK for 3 times!
|hp=1874
|def=167
|atk=134
|rush=143
|gene1=In Dragon Form, {race} ATK +60
|gene2=In Dragon Form, {race} HP +600
|gene3=In Dragon Form, {race} DEF +60
|gene4=In Dragon Form, {race} RUSH +60
|gene7=In Dragon Form, {race} ATK +180 (Awakened)
|}}
